content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{
  "change_summary": "Implemented the drain completion fix in src/cli/drain.rs by removing the direct git push to origin HEAD:master from the bead mutation persistence path. Bead sync commits are now moved onto a drain/beads-sync-<short-sha> branch, pushed through ProcessPrToolPort, opened as a PR against the resolved base branch, and watched through bead_workflow::pr_watch::watch_pr until merged. The normal per-bead success path continues to use open_pr_for_completed_run plus watch_pr before closing the bead.",
  "outstanding_risks": [
    "br lint could not be run because br is not installed on the ambient PATH or in the Nix dev shell in this environment."
  ],
  "steps": [
    {
      "order": 1,
      "description": "Inspected the drain success path, CLI adapter, and existing pr_open/pr_watch library functions.",
      "status": "completed"
    },
    {
      "order": 2,
      "description": "Verified the direct master push path was replaced with PR creation and PR watch/merge han

## Steps

1. [Completed] codex implementation turn

## Validation Evidence

None provided.

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
